rationale.art_04e6e8dac8: Portal case emphasizing data quality, agent tools, and UX refinement rather than generic AI hype.
rationale.art_23a5961b7e: Evidence that AI changes buyer search behavior, useful for buyer intent and recommendation hypotheses.
rationale.art_58952c33fa: Direct new-homes AI sales-agent signal for buyer qualification and lead handling.
rationale.art_82b95d2e44: Direct evidence that response-time and CRM automation can improve lead conversion in real estate workflows.
rationale.art_8f98e029e7: Shows client-conversation capture turning CRM interactions into structured data, relevant to CDP and intent modeling.
rationale.art_d97bc82afc: Directly supports the data-moat part of the hypothesis: data quality, not generic AI, decides property search advantage.

rationale.art_0dea901dc1: Hemnet ARPA pressure is direct evidence for portal seller monetization upside and risk.
rationale.art_426e4d1d66: Direct vendor-paid portal advertising case for monetizing sellers without a blanket paid-listing shift.
rationale.art_457eb7d57f: Direct seller-service monetization analogue: a paid/financed service around the selling process rather than basic listing fees.
rationale.art_bbd29db3ea: Alternate/local duplicate of the Daft vendor-paid case; still direct evidence for seller-paid portal advertising.
